summary: pc-optimizer exfiltrates host information to attacker-controlled C2
details: The package's collect.js imports child_process, fs, http, https, and os, reads host identifiers via os.hostname() and os.homedir(), probes filesystem paths with fs.existsSync, and POSTs collected data to the hardcoded endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The module name ("pc-optimizer") gives no legitimate justification for shipping host information off-machine to a third-party domain unrelated to any documented vendor. The combination of system-info collection, filesystem probing, child_process, and a hardcoded non-vendor HTTP destination is the canonical exfiltration shape.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
